metadata.notes: agent=yes daemon=incapable driver=gap:wait_turn — tokens/cost/cache live ONLY in the per-conversation SQLite protobuf store; the transcript JSONL the daemon tails carries no usage keys and the v1 adapter ships no MetricsReader → no token signal can reach events.jsonl (route frozen).

assessment.body:
## Verdict

**agent=yes** — `agy` does per-turn token accounting; the figures are persisted to the per-conversation SQLite store (`~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/conversations/<conv-id>.db`), encoded as protobuf blobs in the `gen_metadata.data` / `steps.metadata` columns.

**daemon=incapable** — The token signal NEVER reaches the Source the daemon tails. Verified across all four sample transcripts on this machine: `grep -iE '"tokens"|"usage"|"cost"|"cache"'` over every `transcript.jsonl` under `~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/brain/` returns ZERO hits — the JSONL envelope is `{step_index,source,type,status,created_at,content,tool_calls,thinking}` only. The parser doc-comment states it plainly: *"Tokens/cost are not in the JSONL (they live in the per-conversation SQLite protobuf store), so the parser surfaces no usage."* The DB columns that hold them are opaque protobuf `blob`s and the v1 adapter declares NO MetricsReader (only the `transcripts` Permission over the JSONL), so `TotalTokens`/`CacheReadTokens`/`PerTurnContribution` can never be emitted. This is an architecture limit (no trace in the tailed Source), not a parser bug.

**driver=gap:wait_turn** — Moot given the freeze, but recorded for accuracy: the multi-turn recipe needs `wait_turn`, which the antigravity interactive driver stubs (`not_implemented wait_turn`; `DRIVE_ELICITS="send slash sleep"`).

Unblock path: ship a MetricsReader that opens the SQLite store and decodes the protobuf usage blobs; re-assess afterward.
caveats: If a future MetricsReader decodes the SQLite gen_metadata protobuf, daemon would become full and the cell un-freezes.
Cache-read assertion (fresh input=0 on a cached turn) has no transcript surface at all on antigravity.

sources.note: doc-comment: tokens/cost not in JSONL, live in SQLite protobuf store; parser surfaces no usage
only Permission is transcripts (JSONL); no MetricsReader declared
grep for tokens|usage|cost|cache across all sample transcripts → zero hits
.schema shows gen_metadata.data + steps.metadata as opaque protobuf blob columns

recipe.reason: frozen (daemon=incapable): token/cost/cache figures live only in the SQLite protobuf store; the tailed transcript JSONL carries no usage signal and the v1 adapter has no MetricsReader. No recording can satisfy the token assertions.
